positive: A stylized, maximalist jungle biome scene dominated by giant, curling tropical leaves (banana, monstera, philodendron), interwoven with elegant, phosphorescent orchid blooms and delicate, glowing fireflies. The composition is highly symmetrical and centered, designed for a seamless repeating print. Use a lush, jewel-toned color palette of emerald green, deep sapphire blue, and pops of electric violet. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and detailed scientific illustration, rendered with strong, clean black outlines and high contrast. The lighting is dramatic and moody, emanating primarily from the glowing flora, creating depth and silhouette. Flat vector print quality, clean lines, highly detailed flora.
negative: blurry, grain, text, watermark, logo, copyright, cartoon, simple, sketch, cropped, artifacts, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs
